---
id: message-notifications
title: "Message Notifications"
description: "Resend transaction notifications (SMS, email, WhatsApp) for a specific payment transaction identified by `session_id` or `order_no`."
sidebar_label: "Message Notifications"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

custom_edit_url: null
---

>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/message-notification/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Resend transaction notifications (SMS, email, WhatsApp) for a specific payment transaction identified by `session_id` or `order_no`.
